title: Snow golem Backport (StationAPI)
description: Backport snow golem (r1.0.0) to stationapi for b1.7.3 with some change
body:
# Description

Backport snow golem from release 1.0.0 to b1.7.3 with some change 

Also support multiplayer aswell

![Snow golem without Pumpkin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94cfe127027b5f3bcf52d0aaddaafc867226f6d1.png)

## What change?

- Ability to remove Snow golem's pumpkin with shear
- Ability to put Pumpkin back to snow golem
- Snow golem take damage from water and rain now
- Snow golem now drop pumpkin on dead

# Requirement

- [Babric Loader](https://babric.github.io/)
- [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi)
